calendar.matters:
CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elana M. Gold, Esq., appearing for Defendant Flores. There being no appearance, nor objection filed by the Plaintiff, the court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Continued To Feb-03-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Alicia Kennon, Esq. appearing for defendant Rental Car Finance Corporation. No other appearance. Self-represented plaintiff and Counsel for defendant Flores are sanctioned $250.00 each for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/3/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (212)
